chunks.title: David's Initial Plea
chunks.reason: The psalmist addresses God and the people in a continuous prayerful appeal.

chunks.title: Call to Repentance and Trust
chunks.reason: A direct instruction to the audience to reflect, cease sinning, and offer sacrifices.

chunks.title: Confidence in God's Presence
chunks.reason: The psalmist contrasts the crowd's anxiety with his own peace and trust in Yahweh.
